case_title: PATEL, J. T. vs. PATTON, TINA AKA JUDITH GILMORE et al

REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $83.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT PATTON, TINA AKA JUDITH GILMORE
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $17.14 FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, J. T.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, J. T. AS TO DEFENDANT PATTON, TINA AKA JUDITH GILMORE DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED

EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT PATTON, TINA AKA JUDITH GILMORE
